content: The Upanishads expound the secret meaning of the Vedas and treat of Brahma, according to [2]. They are considered the crowning part of the Veda, providing knowledge about the ultimate reality and the self. [1] also mentions the importance of being properly instructed by knowers of the Brahman, implying that the Upanishads contain teachings on spiritual growth and self-realization.
